span.p:
Top-quartile health
AND an earned-value trigger fired?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
STABILIZE — not eligible
pitching bottom/mid burns credibility + misallocates

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Named decision-maker confirmed
alive in role THIS quarter?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RE-THREAD sponsor FIRST
map a live buyer; no pitch to an empty seat

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Recent leadership transition
(org readiness in flux)?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
STABILIZE THEN EXPAND
org-readiness gate failed; re-establish sponsor buy-in

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Adoption is deep on current scope
(not just broad/shallow)?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
DEEPEN current scope first
expansion on shallow adoption won't stick

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RENEW-WITH-EXPAND
lead with value, fold into the renewal motion

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OPEN EXPANSION NOW
arm the champion with the ROI story
